{{Quote|We are on the verge of victory, old one. Pull one last strategy out of your mind. Give us that last success.|Kasdakh Bhul, to Czulkang Lah|<ref name="el2" />}}
'''Kasdakh Bhul''' was a member of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste]] and [[Czulkang Lah]]'s second-in-command aboard his [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]] at the [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; Second)|Battle of Borleias]].<ref name="el2" />
